get.description: Get a list of all reporting tags in the preferred order that you can set.

post.summary: Mark an option as default for a reporting tag
post.description: Mark an option as the default option or clear default option for a reporting tag.

parameters.name: default_option_id
parameters.description: ID of the option to be marked as default. If this parameter is not sent or sent empty, the current default option of the tag will be removed.

delete.description: Delete a reporting tag. If there are any usages of the reporting tag in transactions,  custom views or workflows, you will not be able to delete the tag.

message.example: The reporting tag has been deleted successfully.

put.description:
Create, update or delete the options of a reporting tag. Reorder and arrange them in an hierarchical structure as per your organization requirements.
NOTE:
  1. An option cannot be a child option beyond five hierarchical level.
  2. The overall children of an option cannot exceed 500 options.

Update the visibility conditions (or filter in some places) of a reporting tag. You can set other tags or location as filters for a tag. Check our help document to know about the requirements of a tag to be associated as a filter to another tag.

post.description: Mark a reporting tag as active so that you can use it on entities which you allowed.  A newly created tag will be in draft state. Use this to mark that tag as ready.

message.example: The reporting tag has been activated.

post.description: Mark a reporting tag as inactive.

message.example: The reporting tag has been deactivated.

post.description: Mark a reporting tag's option as active.

message.example: The reporting tag option has been activated.

post.description: Mark a reporting tag's option as inactive.

message.example: The reporting tag option has been deactivated.

currency_symbol.description: Symbol used to denote currency of a country

price_precision.description: Amount precision upto n decimal points.

is_base_currency.description: Whether it is the base currency. It can either be true or false.

exchange_rate.description: Exchange rate of the currency with respect to base currency.

message.example: The currency details have been updated.

contact_id.description: Unique ID for the contact. This is used as an identifier.

contact_name.description: Name of the contact person of the organisation

company_name.description: Registered name of the company the contact represents.

contact_salutation.description: Salutation of the contact person. Possible values are Mr or Mrs or Miss or Ms or Dr

has_transaction.description: Whether this expense category has transactions associated with it. It can either be true or false.

is_crm_customer.description: Whether the Contact is a CRM customer. It can either be trueor false.

is_linked_with_zohocrm.description: Whether the Contact is linked with ZOHO CRM. It can either be trueor false.

status.description: Status of the user. It can either be active or inactive or deleted or invited.

email.description: Active Email ID of the user.

twitter.description: Twitter handle of the contact person.

facebook.description: Facebook ID of the contact person.

state.description: State where the organisation is located

zip.description: ZIP/Postal code of the organisation's location

contact_person_id.description: Unique ID for contact person. This is used as an identifier.

salutation.description: Salutation of the contact person. Possible values are Mr or Mrs or Miss or Ms or Dr

skype.description: Skype Name / Number of the contact person.

can_invite.description: Whether the contact person is allowed to invite others. It can either be true or false.

is_primary_contact.description: Whether this person is the primary contact person for this contact. It can either be true or false.

customfield_id.description: Unique ID for the Custom Field.

value.description: Value entered in the Custom Field.

created_time.description: Time at which this user was created.

last_modified_time.description: Time at which this user's details were last modified.

contact_persons.description: List of contact persons for the contact. It contains contact_person_id, salutation, first_name,last_name,email,phone,mobile and is_primary_contact.

gl_code.description: A unique reference code for the category.

is_maximum_amount_required.description: Whether there is any maximum amount limit for expense. It can either be true or false.

is_description_required.description: Whether description is mandatory. It can either be true or false.

is_receipt_required.description: Whether receipt is required. It can either be true or false.

is_mileage.description: Whether this is a mileage category. It can either be true or false.

is_perdiem_account.description: Whether the category is a Per Diem one. It can either be true or false.

can_override_settings.description: Whether this expense category can override the default polices. It can either be true or false.

is_custom.description: Whether the expense category is custom. It can either be true or false.

is_super_parent.description: Whether the category is a super parent. It can either be true or false.

is_enabled.description: Whether the category is currently enabled. It can either be true or false.

can_delete.description: Whether we can delete this expense category. It can either be true or false.

depth.description: Depth or how much indentation required of the option in the hierarchy

is_child_present.description: Whether the category contains any child category. It can either be true or false.

child_count.description: Number of child categories the category contains.

Status.Inactive.description: List of all Inactive Expense Categories.

filter_by.description: For filtering trips based on status.

message.example: The expense category has been created.

due_date.description: Due date for the expense report.

is_archived.description: Whether the report is archived. It can either be true or false.

due_days.description: Number of days till the due date.

approver_id.description: Unique ID for the current approver.

approver_email.description: Email ID of the current approver.

approver_photo_url.description: Photo Url of the current approver.

submitted_to_id.description: Unique ID of the person to whom the trip was submitted first.

submitted_to_name.description: Name of the person to whom the trip was submitted first.

submitted_to_email.description: Email ID of the person to whom the trip was submitted first.

submitted_to_employee_no.description: Employee Number of the person to whom the trip was submitted first.

submitted_to_department_name.description: Department Name of the person to whom the trip was submitted first.

submitted_to_photo_url.description: Photo Url of the person to whom the report was submitted first.

created_date.description: Date when the trip was created.

created_by_id.description: Unique ID of the person who created the trip.

created_by_name.description: Name of the person who created the trip.

created_by_email.description: Email ID of the person who created the trip.

creator_photo_url.description: Photo Url of the person who created the report.

paid_through_account_id.description: Unique ID for the paid through account.

project_name.description: Name of the project associated with the trip.

per_diem_days.description: No of days for which per diem is applied.

project_id.description: Unique ID of the project associated with the trip.

expense_type.description: Type of expense.Possible values can be non_mileage or manual or per_diem.

is_inclusive_tax.description: Whether the expense amount is inclusive of tax. It can either be true or false.

mileage_type.description: Mileage type. Possible values can be non_mileage or manual or odometer or gps or imaps or gmaps or wmaps.

tax_id.description: Unique ID for tax generated by the server. This is used as an identifier.

is_personal.description: Whether the expense personal. It can either be true or false.

receipt_type.description: Receipt type.Possible values can be jpg or png.

is_uncategorized.description: Whether the expense is uncategorized. It can either be true or false.

is_mandatory_fields_missing.description: Whether the mandatory fields are missing. It can either be true or false.

paid_through_account_name.description: Name of the paid through account.

is_billable.description: Whether the customer needs to be billed for the trip.

is_expired.description: Whether the expense is expired. It can either be true or false.

is_reimbursable.description: Whether the expense is reimbursable. It can either be true or false.

expired_by.description: No. of days since the expense has expired.

customer_name.description: Name of the customer associated with the trip.

customer_id.description: Unique ID of the customer associated with the trip.

expense_id.description: Unique ID for expense. This is used as an identifier.

reimbursable_expenses_count.description: Number of expenses that can be reimbursed.

non_reimbursable_expenses_count.description: Number of expenses that cannot be reimbursed.

policy_violated.description: Whether expense policies are violated. It can either be true or false.

reimbursements.description: Reimbursements made for the expense report.

excess_applied_bcy_amount.description: Excess Applied Amount in Base Currency.

excess_unapplied_bcy_amount.description: Excess Unapplied Amount in Base Currency.

advance_payments.description: Advance payments made on the expense report.

is_advancepayment_allowed.description: Whether the Advance Payment is allowed. It can either be true or false.

can_create_advance.description: Whether the user is allowed to create advance. It can either be true or false.

next_approver_id.description: Unique ID of the Next Approver.

previous_approver_employee_no.description: Employee Number of the Previous Approver.

previous_approver_department_name.description: Department Name of the Previous Approver.

comments.description: List of comments associated with the trip.

previous_approver_email.description: Email ID of the Previous Approver.

commented_by_id.description: Unique ID of the person who commented.

user_id.description: Unique ID for user generated by the server. This is used as identifier.

role_id.description: Unique ID for the role of user.

default_approver_name.description: Name of the Approver for a user.

can_approve.description: Whether the the user is allowed to approve. It can either be true or false.

is_current_user.description: Whether the the user is a Current User or not. It can either be true or false.

is_selected.description: Whether selected as active. It can either be true or false.

email_ids.description: Registered Email Ids of the user.

approves_to_id.description: ID of the User getting approved by.

approves_to_name.description: Name of to user getting approved by.

submission_amount_limit.description: Limit of the amount being submitted.

approval_amount_limit.description: Limit of the amount being approved.

tag_option_id.description: Unique ID for Tag option generated by the server.

created_by.description: Unique ID of the person who created the expense.

is_receipt_only.description: Whether the expense is a receipt only expense.

engine_capacity_range.description: Range of the Engine Capacity.Possible values can be less_than_1400cc or between_1401cc_and_1600cc or between_1601cc_and_2000cc or more_than_2000cc.(UK Edition Only)

fuel_type.description: Type of Fuel.Possible values can be petrol or lpg or diesel.(UK Edition Only)

reimbursement_paid_through_account_id.description: Account id of the Reimbursement Payment.

line_item_id.description: Unique ID for identifying the line item. This is server generated.

item_total.description: Total amount for the line item.

attendee_id.description: Unique ID of the attendee as a identifier.

line_items.description: List of items associated with the trip

duplicate_expense_id.description: Unique ID of the expense to be merged.

account_created_date.description: Date of creation of the account

time_zone.description: Time Zone of the Organisation's country

portal_name.description: Poratal name for the organisation. Length of the portal name should be greater than 4 and less than 31. Allowed chars [a-z][A-Z][0-9]

street_address1.description: Street name of the Billing address of the Organisation

street_address2.description: Continyed billing address of the organisation

industry_size.description: The size of the industry. The possibe values could be "small scale", "medium scale", "large scale"

unverified_email.description: To verify email address of the organisation's contact

is_transaction_available.description: To check for transaction history of the organisation

show_org_address_as_one_field.description: Display the complete address of the organisation in one box

projects.description: List of projects run by the organisation

organizations.description: List of organisatiions under an account

field_separator.description: Field separator for components in date.

is_tag_mandatory.description: Boolean to check if the tag is mandatory

tags_response.description: Array of reporting tags associated with this line item in the response. Each tag consists of a `tag_id`, `tag_name`, `option_id`, and `option_name` that categorize the line item for reporting and analytics purposes. Tags help organize and filter data across reports and enable detailed business intelligence analysis.

tag_order.description: The order in which the tag appears

is_mandatory.description: Whether the Custom Field is Mandatory. It can either be true or false.

is_class.description: Is segmentation enabled for the tag

is_draft.description: Is tag still in draft state

filter_tag_id.description: Filter tag ID. If the filter 'type' is location, null should be passed

filter_type.description:
Type of filter entity.
Allowed values: Tag tag and Location location.

filter_option_id.description:
Option ID for the filter. It can be an option ID or flags.
Allowed flags: all - Instead of selecting all options, you can send this flag to denote all options of the filter tag or location are selected for the filter to the respective tag. untagged - When you want to show an option when no option is selected for the filter tag. Note: This flag cannot be used for location filter.

filter_option_name.description:
Option Name for the filter. It can be an option name or flags.
Allowed flags: All - Instead of selecting all options, you can send this flag to denote all options of the filter tag or location are selected for the filter to the respective tag. Untagged - When you want to show an option when no option is selected for the filter tag. Note: This flag cannot be used for location filter.

option_is_default.description: Is the option default for the tag

option_is_active.description: Is the option active for the tag

entities.description: Entities that can only be enabled or disabled which can also be called as mono-preference entities.

preference.description: Preference type. Currently, only 'transaction' and 'line_item' is supported for this node

entities.description: Entities that can only be enabled or disabled

entity_name.description:
Entity Name. Possible Values:
Expenses and Purchase Requests - purchases

criteria_options.description: List containing filter tags and location

options.description: List of options to be updated.

is_filter_configured.description: If filter is configured for this tag, it will be true

dependent_tags.description: The tags and location that is associated as filter for the tag

dependent_id.description: Dependent Tag's ID. If the dependent is location, value will be empty

dependent_name.description: Dependent Tag's Name. If the dependent is location, value will be Location

dependent_order.description: The order in which the dependent tags appear. If the dependent is location, value will be empty

dependent_type.description: Type of the dependent. Allowed values: Tag tag, Location location

dependent_options.description: Options selected for the dependent tag. If the dependent is location, this will be empty

dependent_option_order.description: The order in which the options appear.

possible_filter_tags.description: List of tags that can be used as filter for the tag

type.description: Type of the tag. Allowed values: Tag tag, Location location

is_associated.description: Indicates whether the tag is already associated as filter for the tag

is_restricted.description: Indicates whether the tag is restricted to be used as filter for the tag

restricted_reason.example: The modules associated with this reporting tag are not set at the appropriate level compared to the current tag. Kindly refer to the requirements for a filter tag.

option_order.description: The order in which the options appear.

parent_id.description: Parent Option ID. If the options does not have a parent, this will be empty

parent_name.description: Parent Option Name. If the options does not have a parent, this will be empty
